scripts.clean: rm -rf build coverage tmp src/*.js src/*.js.map vscode-extension/media/*.js vscode-extension/media/*.js.map
scripts.build:ts: npx tsc --project tsconfig.json --outDir build/runtime --rootDir . --noCheck && node scripts/build-runtime-metadata.mjs && node scripts/build-extension-host.mjs && node scripts/build-webview-bundle.mjs
scripts.build:test: rm -rf build/test && npx tsc --project tsconfig.tests.json --outDir build/test --rootDir .
scripts.test: npm run -s build:ts && npm run -s build:test && node --test build/test/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run -s build:ts && npm run -s build:test && c8 --all --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --reports-dir build/coverage --temp-directory build/coverage/tmp --100 --include=build/runtime/src/doc-service.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-format.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-binary.js --include=build/runtime/src/doc-view.js --include=build/runtime/src/view-state.js --include=build/runtime/vscode-extension/media/doc-pipeline.js node --test build/test/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.setup: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js setup
scripts.ingest: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js ingest
scripts.maintain: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js maintain
scripts.reconstruct: npm run -s build:ts && node build/runtime/src/cli.js reconstruct
